item.title: China Says It Has Agreed With U.S. to Set Up Trade and Investment Bodies
item.description: The confirmation fulfills one expected outcome of Trump’s visit to Beijing and solidifies a truce between the world’s two largest economies.

item.title: Iran’s Seizure of Chinese Security Ship Shows Its Favors for Friends Have Limits
item.description: The action near the Strait of Hormuz occurred the day the Trump-Xi summit began in Beijing, with Iran on the agenda.

item.title: See How China Is Gaining Power in Contested Waters
item.description: Chinese fishing vessels pushed within 150 miles of a U.S. naval base in Japan last month, the latest maneuver in a decadeslong campaign.

item.title: Opinion | The Good-News-Is-No-News China Summit
item.description: The big test for Trump is whether he lets Xi veto arms sales to Taiwan.

item.title: China’s Economy Unexpectedly Weakens as Iran War Fallout Mounts
item.description: The country’s export machine continues to hum but its economic growth has become increasingly lopsided.

item.title: Beijing’s ‘Industrial Policy of Everything’ Leaves Rest of the World in the Dust
item.description: Government support encompasses the old, the new, goods and services, micro and macro. Nothing Trump elicits in China will alter this.

item.title: Five Takeaways From the Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: Both sides want to stabilize U.S.-China relations, but disagreements remain.

item.title: Trump and Xi Want to Stabilize U.S.-China Ties. Now Comes the Hard Part.
item.description: The president’s tightly choreographed visit to Beijing masked big differences between U.S. and China.

item.title: See the Big Moments and Key People on Trump’s Second State Visit to China
item.description: The summit projected an air of friendship between the governments and business communities of two rival superpowers.

item.title: As China Encroaches, Even New Zealand Is Getting Serious About Its Military
item.description: Billions will be spent in the coming years—including on missiles, drones and base upgrades—as the remote country squares up to a widening threat.

item.title: The U.S. Navy’s New Insurance Policy for War With China Is an Australian Base
item.description: The Pentagon plans to deploy submarines to an expanding facility in allies’ strategy to deter Beijing.

item.title: ‘Defending Taiwan’ Review: High Stakes in the Strait
item.description: Supporting Taiwan’s security in the face of Chinese threats of invasion is vital both for the island and the rest of the world.

item.title: Xi’s Taiwan Warning to Trump Highlights Tensions in Beijing Summit
item.description: The Chinese leader’s comment that any mishandling of Taiwan could lead to “an extremely dangerous situation” raised an issue that has loomed over President Trump’s trip.

item.title: Xi’s Taiwan Warning to Trump Highlights Tensions in Beijing Summit
item.description: The Chinese leader’s comment that any mishandling of Taiwan could lead to “an extremely dangerous situation” raised an issue that has loomed over President Trump’s trip.

item.title: Five Takeaways From the Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: Both sides want to stabilize U.S.-China relations, but disagreements remain.
